title: Walrus Yes: The Making of Tusk
original_title: Walrus Yes: The Making of Tusk
overview: 5 years ago Kevin Smith tried to end his career with the movie Tusk. Enjoy this documentary on the making of Tusk 'Walrus Yes'.
